name: stripe-plinks-snapshot.py
description: Snapshot of all active Stripe payment links with URL-alias <-> plink_id <-> product <-> price <-> redirect mapping. Closes the S22 capability gap: the buy.stripe.com/<alias> URL is opaque and cannot be reverse-mapped to plink_id from code alone, but the Stripe API exposes both. Without this, label-vs-URL audits (e.g. for-coaches.js had two candidate $97 URLs in S22) require Armando's strategic call. With this, the mapping is one CLI call. Modes: default markdown table, --save writes to deliverables, --json raw, --csv, --find <alias-or-plink-or-product> for one-shot lookup. Smoke-tested 2026-05-20 self-review: resolved the exact S22 ambiguity (bJe7sK0tNdLjgle0pscMM0b -> plink_1TDwTmAdkDx8xZMkmxB9yn55 = MidasTools All Kits Bundle $97 -> /thank-you?kit=bundle).

name: reconstruct-recovered-subs.py
description: Reconstruct synthetic recovery JSON by diffing the live gist subscribers against FALLBACK_SUBSCRIBERS in lib/subscribers.js. Built 2026-05-14 (Session 30) because pair-Session 25 merged 17 STORAGE FAILED subs directly into the gist but the parsed JSON from recover-storage-failed.py was discarded post-merge. Produces the exact input schema send-recovery-welcomes.py expects. Idempotent (gist∖fallback is deterministic). Usage: python3 .founder/tools/reconstruct-recovered-subs.py --out /tmp/recovered.json — then chain to send-recovery-welcomes.py --in /tmp/recovered.json --dry-run | --apply.

name: track-blob-stats.py
description: Query and aggregate the live /api/track jsonblob with composable filters + groupby. Replaces the ad-hoc curl+python one-liners I wrote 5+ times this week during standups (chatgpt-source breakdown, unique session counts, CTR per plink, top page_paths). Filters: --filter k=v (event, page_path, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, session_id, payload.*, attribution.*), --since 24h/30m/7d, --path-prefix /q/. Output: --groupby <key> prints markdown table; --groupby session_id computes unique-session counts; default shows recent rows. Built 2026-05-11 self-review; smoke-tested groupby page_path + filter utm_source=chatgpt.com --groupby session_id (caught real signal: 4 chatgpt events but only 2 unique sessions — meaningful for May 14 falsifiability of "sustained citation" hypothesis).

name: send-recovery-welcomes.py
description: Fire source-aware welcome emails to subscribers recovered by recover-storage-failed.py. Reads the same JSON list, classifies each by source (audit-template / finance-club / quiz / *-lead / free-tool / fallback), and renders a tailored welcome that delivers what they originally signed up for + acknowledges the storage-bug delay honestly. Idempotent via .founder/state/recovery-welcomes-sent.json log (skips already-sent on re-run; safe after partial failures). Built Session 26d (2026-05-08 night) as the post-recovery counterpart to recover-storage-failed.py. Without this, recovered subs sit dormant in the gist. Smoke-tested with 6-source fixture (all 6 variants classified + rendered correctly + idempotency verified).

name: recover-storage-failed.py
description: Parse ‘⚠️ STORAGE FAILED — New subscriber’ emails accumulating in iam+midas@armando.mx since the May 5 GH_GIST_TOKEN-missing-on-Vercel bug, then merge the recovered subscribers into the live gist (b460cc98bbc21692f1f209e852c551b5/subscribers.json). Two subcommands: `parse <file>` extracts subs (handles full-body, body-only, and subject-only fallbacks) into JSON; `merge --in <json> --dry-run|--apply` patches the live gist via GitHub API, dedup’d on email. Pre-built Session 26c (2026-05-08 night) BEFORE Armando shares the inbox dump. Smoke-tested with synthetic 3-message fixture: parse ✓, dedup ✓, dry-run ✓.

name: publish-gist.sh
description: Publish a markdown file from .founder/content/gists/ as a public gist on gist.github.com/manduks/, submit to IndexNow, and log the URL. Supports --all to batch-publish every unshipped file. Requires GITHUB_GIST_TOKEN env var or token at .founder/.gh_gist_token (gitignored).

name: update-gist.sh
description: PATCH an already-published gist (and its local source file) to add utm_source=gist&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=<slug> to every midastools.co link. Enables per-gist traffic and revenue attribution. Supports --all. Requires the same token as publish-gist.sh.

name: devto-publish.py
description: Publish a markdown file from .founder/content/devto/ to dev.to/@midastools via the Dev.to API with canonical_url pointing back to midastools.co. Handles the 2-step draft+publish dance. Requires DEVTO_API_KEY env var or token at .founder/.devto_token (gitignored). Uses browser User-Agent (Dev.to blocks Python default UA with 403).

name: devto-stats.py
description: Pull authenticated stats (page_views_count, public_reactions_count, comments_count) for every published Dev.to article via /api/articles/me/published. Prints a markdown table. With --save, writes a dated snapshot to .founder/deliverables/devto-stats-YYYY-MM-DD.md and appends a row to .founder/content/devto/STATS_HISTORY.md for trend tracking. With --csv, prints CSV. Unblocks Dev.to channel measurement without depending on Armando for referrer data.

name: favicon-generator.py
description: Generate the full Midas Tools favicon set (favicon.ico multi-res, 16/32/48 PNGs, 180x180 apple-touch-icon, 192/512 PWA icons, site.webmanifest) from a brand-aligned bold M on accent #3B5FFF rounded square with white-dot accent echoing the MIDAS·TOOLS wordmark separator. Idempotent — re-run after any brand change.

name: send-one.py
description: Send a one-off transactional email via Resend with optional PDF attachment(s). Built to fire mini-assessment PDFs within the 4-hour SLA on reply-type-B audit-pitch replies. Generalized for any one-off send: --to, --subject, --body-file, --attach (repeatable), --dry-run. Reuses the same Inter typeface HTML wrapper as send-pitches.py. Resolves the capability gap that send-pitches.py had no attachment support.

name: fire-may6-followups.sh
description: Fire the May 6 audit-pitch follow-ups (Hiedeh + Doug) via send-one.py with pre-staged body files at .founder/sales/followup-may6-{hiedeh,doug}.body.txt. Dry-run by default; pass --send to actually send. Pre-flight: verify no replies received from Hiedeh/Doug since Apr 28. Smoke-tested 2026-05-03 (HTML render + payload shape correct). Reduces May 6 morning to a single command.

name: fire-may8-followups.sh
description: Fire the May 8 audit-pitch follow-up (Pham via C. Brannan) — 10-day cadence (longer than Hiedeh/Doug 8-day) because IP attorneys reply slower. Dry-run by default; pass --send. Pre-flight: verify no reply since Apr 28. Smoke-tested 2026-05-03. Body at .founder/sales/followup-may8-pham.body.txt.

name: audit-signal-monitor.py
description: Watch live subscribers for audit-tagged signups (source=audit-template, ai-audit, or any field containing 'audit-*' / 'clarity-assessment'). Prints snapshot vs prior run; exits 10 if a NEW audit-tagged sub appeared (signal to fire 1-to-1 outreach via send-one.py within 4h). Reads GitHub gist b460cc98 (primary) with jsonblob fallback per Session 25 storage migration. Hourly cron candidate. State at .founder/state/audit-monitor-last.json. Built 2026-05-03 to instrument the audit-curious funnel.

name: customer-attribution.py
description: Pull Stripe checkout-session attribution for the 3 paying customers (Arnaud, Shantae, George). Resolves payment-link IDs, success/cancel URLs, Stripe Link usage, session metadata, and cross-references with email subscriber list. Built Session 158 to answer the HIGH-priority open question 'how did our 3 buyers find us?' from revenue-ledger-2026-05-05.md. With --save writes a dated report to .founder/deliverables/.

name: audit-payment-links.py
description: Read-only audit of all active Stripe payment links. Flags hosted_confirmation (no redirect to our site), wrong-TLD redirects (.com vs .co), and unknown kit slugs (slugs that aren't in pages/thank-you.js KITS map and so fall back to OpenClaw Starter Kit). With --save writes a dated audit report to .founder/deliverables/. Built Session 158 after discovering 14/34 active payment links had post-purchase delivery bugs.

name: fix-payment-links.py
description: Idempotent patcher for the 9 active Stripe payment links that had hosted_confirmation (no redirect) instead of redirecting to /thank-you?kit=<slug>. --dry-run by default; --apply patches Stripe via API. Built Session 158 — covered Shantae's $97 All Kits Bundle plus 8 other kit plinks. Stamps metadata.fixed_session=158 + fixed_date=2026-05-05 for audit trail.

name: partner-signal-monitor.py
description: Watch the live subscriber gist for partner-channel-tagged signups (finance-club, boucher-finance-club, cfo-accelerator, cfo-club, etc.) from the new /finance-club side-door page. Each NEW partner-tagged sub validates the cross-promo swap is converting and triggers same-day welcome via send-one.py. Mirrors audit-signal-monitor.py architecture. State at .founder/state/partner-monitor-last.json. Daily cron candidate. Exit 10 on signal.

name: quiz-visit-monitor.py
description: Watch the live track-events jsonblob for /q/{slug} page visits. Personalized prospect quiz pages (/q/donnie-wooten etc.) generate page_view events captured by /api/track. This monitor reads the track blob, filters page_view events whose path begins with /q/, dedupes by slug, and surfaces NEW slugs since the last snapshot. Strongest leading indicator of cold-email channel engagement BEFORE a reply. Exit 10 = NEW prospect engaged. State at .founder/state/quiz-monitor-last.json. Built 2026-05-08 to instrument the dark cold-email channel after batch-1 fired May 6.

name: reddit-ad-monitor.py
description: Watch /api/track for Reddit-attributed events from the May 14 P4b-A $50 campaign. Filters events with utm_source=reddit, reports unique sessions + cta_clicks since last run, snapshots state at .founder/state/reddit-monitor-last.json. Exit 10 = new session(s), exit 20 = new cta_click(s) — fire 1-to-1 outreach or watch Stripe within 30 min if 20.

name: nano-banana-ad-gen.py
description: Generate ad creative images via Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (aka Nano Banana). Variants in PROMPTS dict: editorial-desk (premium overhead workspace photo), isometric-cards (3D Stripe/Linear-style hero), dark-hero (glassmorphism panel). Usage: nano-banana-ad-gen.py <out-path> <variant-name>. Reads key from .founder/.gemini_key.

name: finalize-reddit-ad.py
description: Take a Nano Banana isometric render and produce Reddit-ready final (1080x1080 with text overlay) + thumbnail (400x400 tight crop). Bakes headline + $29 price chip per Reddit's +32% CTR text-overlay finding (Gupta Media playbook).
